nasb.text: When the kingdom of Rehoboam was established and strong, he and all Israel with him forsook the law of the Lord.

esv.text: When the rule of Rehoboam was established and he was strong, he abandoned the law of the Lord, and all Israel with him.

cnv.text: 羅波安的王位穩定，他也強盛起來，就離棄了耶和華的律法，全體以色列人也都跟隨他。

ccb.text: 罗波安王位稳定、国势强盛后，就离弃耶和华的律法，以色列人也都随从他。
